title: Emergency Declaration Used to Suppress Protected Speech

violations.summary: Executive branch uses an emergency declaration to restrict protected expression, in violation of the absolute bar on overriding Article V rights through emergency powers.

satisfied_duties.duty: submit the emergency declaration to the Regional Assembly
satisfied_duties.outcome: submitted the emergency declaration to the Regional Assembly
voided the emergency-based restriction on protected expression; Article V rights may not be overridden by emergency declaration
satisfied_duties.source: Article III Section 5.3(f) and Article V

satisfied_duties.duty: approve or reject the emergency declaration
satisfied_duties.outcome: approved the emergency declaration following court-ordered scheduling

ai_summary.primary_violation: Executive branch uses an emergency declaration to restrict protected expression, in violation of the absolute bar on overriding Article V rights through emergency powers.
